productName: Buddies Flavored AIO - Raspberry Parfait - 1g - DOH
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Raspberry Parfait oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of violet, plum, and berry, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
